calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Continued To Aug-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Rolf Tyler, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. The court vacates the sanction previously imposed on the Plaintiff on Jan-13-2026 and Apr-07-2026. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 18, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
